body_excerpt: In iaxxx_calc_i2s_div of iaxxx-codec.c, there is a possible hardware port write with user controlled data due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
